prompt: Turn on relay1 and verify by reading it back; halt after verification.
Turn off relay1 and verify by reading it back; halt after verification.
Turn on relay2 and verify by reading it back; halt after verification.
Turn off relay2 and verify by reading it back; halt after verification.
Try up to 2 times to turn on relay1 and verify it reads back as 1; halt after the retry loop.
Try up to 3 times to turn off relay1 and verify it reads back as 0; halt after the retry loop.
Try up to 2 times to turn on relay2 and verify it reads back as 1; halt after the retry loop.
Try up to 3 times to turn off relay2 and verify it reads back as 0; halt after the retry loop.
Try up to 2 times to turn on relay1, but verify it reads back as 0; halt after the retry loop.
Try up to 2 times to turn off relay2, but verify it reads back as 1; halt after the retry loop.
Turn on relay1, verify relay1 reads back as 1, then read water_sensor and halt.
expected_mir:
task v3_011 {
  require cap(relay1)
  require cap(water_sensor)
  set relay1 = 1
  readback relay1 expect 1
  read water_sensor
  halt
}

prompt: Turn off relay2, verify relay2 reads back as 0, then read temperature_sensor and halt.
expected_mir:
task v3_012 {
  require cap(relay2)
  require cap(temperature_sensor)
  set relay2 = 0
  readback relay2 expect 0
  read temperature_sensor
  halt
}

prompt: Try up to 3 times to turn on relay1, wait 100ms, verify it reads back as 1, and halt after the retry loop.
Try up to 3 times to turn off relay2, wait 50ms, verify it reads back as 0, and halt after the retry loop.
Turn on relay1, verify it, wait 50ms, turn off relay1, verify it reads back as 0, and halt.
expected_mir:
task v3_015 {
  require cap(relay1)
  set relay1 = 1
  readback relay1 expect 1
  wait 50ms
  set relay1 = 0
  readback relay1 expect 0
  halt
}

prompt: Turn on relay2, verify it, wait 100ms, turn off relay2, verify it reads back as 0, and halt.
expected_mir:
task v3_016 {
  require cap(relay2)
  set relay2 = 1
  readback relay2 expect 1
  wait 100ms
  set relay2 = 0
  readback relay2 expect 0
  halt
}
